title: Tester v0.4.10 Approved Data Import Fix
notes:
Changes:
- Tester now accepts the Launcher approved data shape saved at:
  Documents/Anime Power League Helper/Approved Data/Tester/approved-data.json
- Tester now searches inside approved-data.json for the real items array instead of requiring only one exact JSON shape.
- Supports items nested inside sharedDatabase, data, database, payload, snapshot, and other wrapper objects.
- Keeps the cleaner Tester UI from v0.4.9.
- Updates version to tester-v0.4.10.

After installing:
1. Open Tester v0.4.10.
2. Use File > Import Approved Data From Launcher.
3. Expected: Tester loads 302 database items.
4. Help > Check Tester Data Update should confirm the approved data file instead of throwing the old error.
